title: cast of a SQL boolean value to a string or clob or (var)char is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_fuzzing (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, flag BOOLEAN, description VARCHAR(10));
SELECT id, flag, flag::VARCHAR(10) as flag_str FROM t_fuzzing ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, flag, description::BOOLEAN as desc_to_bool FROM t_fuzzing WHERE flag IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
key_bug_features: casting SQL boolean value to string or varchar
